title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Maximum Contribution Applying in Each Region From 1 July 2026 Publication date: 11 June 2026 The maximum contribution that applies in each region for long-term aged residential care, from 1 July 2026. Notice Older people (65+)

## Maximum Contribution Applying in Each Region From 1 July 2026
The maximum contribution that applies in each region for long-term aged residential care, from 1 July 2026.
- Consultation on developing a specified prescription medicines list for designated paramedic prescribers Publication date: 6 June 2026 The Ministry of Health is inviting submissions on a proposed list of prescription medicines for designated paramedic prescribers. This follows approval by the Government of a proposal to grant designated prescribing authority to paramedics under the Medicines Act 1981. Consultation Therapeutic products

## Consultation on developing a specified prescription medicines list for designated paramedic prescribers
The Ministry of Health is inviting submissions on a proposed list of prescription medicines for designated paramedic prescribers. This follows approval by the Government of a proposal to grant designated prescribing authority to paramedics under the Medicines Act 1981.
- Therapeutic products
- Medicines (Consent by Verification) Rules 2026 Publication date: 20 May 2026 The Medicines (Consent by Verification) Rules 2026 are made pursuant to section 22E of the Medicines Act 1981. The Rules set out the requirements relating to applications for consent by verification and medicines for which consent by verification is sought. The Rules also set out requirements for lodging an application for consent by verification and for processing an application for consent by verification. Publication Medicine issues

## Medicines (Consent by Verification) Rules 2026
The Medicines (Consent by Verification) Rules 2026 are made pursuant to section 22E of the Medicines Act 1981. The Rules set out the requirements relating to applications for consent by verification and medicines for which consent by verification is sought. The Rules also set out requirements for lodging an application for consent by verification and for processing an application for consent by verification.
- Greenhouse Gas Emissions for the 2024/25 Financial Year: Report and inventory Publication date: 20 May 2026 This document provides the report and inventory for the greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the Ministry of Health for the financial year 2024/25 (1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025) Publication Environmental health About the Ministry

## Greenhouse Gas Emissions for the 2024/25 Financial Year: Report and inventory
This document provides the report and inventory for the greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions of the Ministry of Health for the financial year 2024/25 (1 July 2024 to 30 June 2025)
- Environmental health
- Authorisation under regulation 12(b) of the Cremation Regulations 1973 to authorise Medical Referees to permit cremations to be carried out without complying with Regulation 7 Publication date: 1 May 2026 This notice authorises Medical Referees to permit cremations to be carried out without complying with the requirement in regulation 7(1) of the cremation regulations in certain circumstances. Notice Regulation Burial and cremation

## Authorisation under regulation 12(b) of the Cremation Regulations 1973 to authorise Medical Referees to permit cremations to be carried out without complying with Regulation 7
This notice authorises Medical Referees to permit cremations to be carried out without complying with the requirement in regulation 7(1) of the cremation regulations in certain circumstances.
- Burial and cremation
- Funding to Māori Health Providers 2020/21 to 2024/25 Publication date: 30 April 2026 This publication summarises funding to Māori health providers by the Ministry of Health, Health NZ and the now disestablished Māori Health Authority. It follows on from our previous reports in 2017, and every year from 2021 onwards. Publication Māori health Health system

## Funding to Māori Health Providers 2020/21 to 2024/25
This publication summarises funding to Māori health providers by the Ministry of Health, Health NZ and the now disestablished Māori Health Authority. It follows on from our previous reports in 2017, and every year from 2021 onwards.
- Regional Data Release: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 16 April 2026 These tables present key health indicators from all years of the continuous New Zealand Health Survey for adults and children, broken down by geographic areas and demographics. Publication Statistics Surveys

## Regional Data Release: New Zealand Health Survey
These tables present key health indicators from all years of the continuous New Zealand Health Survey for adults and children, broken down by geographic areas and demographics.
- Ministry of Health Procurement Policy Publication date: 15 April 2026 The procurement policy provides high-level principles that guide procurement at The Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora to ensure compliance with the Government Procurement Charter, the Government Procurement Principles, and the Government Procurement Rules. Publication Ministry policies

## Ministry of Health Procurement Policy
The procurement policy provides high-level principles that guide procurement at The Ministry of Health | Manatū Hauora to ensure compliance with the Government Procurement Charter, the Government Procurement Principles, and the Government Procurement Rules.
- Approval of Organisations, Agencies or Bodies and of Authorised Representatives for the purpose of the Health (Needles and Syringes) Regulations 1998 Publication date: 9 April 2026 This approval allows certain organisations and individuals under regulation 5 of the Health (Needles and Syringes) Regulations 1998 to distribute needles and syringes. Notice Drugs

## Approval of Organisations, Agencies or Bodies and of Authorised Representatives for the purpose of the Health (Needles and Syringes) Regulations 1998
This approval allows certain organisations and individuals under regulation 5 of the Health (Needles and Syringes) Regulations 1998 to distribute needles and syringes.
- Consultation on the Mental Health and Wellbeing Strategy Publication date: 8 April 2026 The Ministry of Health is asking for your feedback on the draft Mental Health and Wellbeing Strategy (the Strategy). The Strategy will set the direction for how the health system improves mental health and wellbeing outcomes for New Zealanders over the next ten years. Consultation Mental health

## Consultation on the Mental Health and Wellbeing Strategy
The Ministry of Health is asking for your feedback on the draft Mental Health and Wellbeing Strategy (the Strategy). The Strategy will set the direction for how the health system improves mental health and wellbeing outcomes for New Zealanders over the next ten years.
- Office of the Director of Mental Health and Addiction Services: Regulatory Report 1 July 2023 to 30 June 2024 Publication date: 31 March 2026 The Office of the Director of Mental Health and Addiction Services Regulatory Report 1 July 2023 to 30 June 2024 provides information and statistics relating to the use of compulsory assessment and treatment legislation in Aotearoa New Zealand. Publication Mental health

## Office of the Director of Mental Health and Addiction Services: Regulatory Report 1 July 2023 to 30 June 2024
The Office of the Director of Mental Health and Addiction Services Regulatory Report 1 July 2023 to 30 June 2024 provides information and statistics relating to the use of compulsory assessment and treatment legislation in Aotearoa New Zealand.
- Action Plan to Prevent and Reduce Substance Harm 2026 – 2029 Publication date: 18 March 2026 This action plan sets out the overarching health system response for the next three years to address substance-related harm experienced in our communities. Publication Addiction Drugs Mental health

## Action Plan to Prevent and Reduce Substance Harm 2026 – 2029
This action plan sets out the overarching health system response for the next three years to address substance-related harm experienced in our communities.
- COVID-19 and long COVID 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 17 March 2026 This page presents a summary of data from questions about COVID-19 and long COVID added to the New Zealand Health Survey (NZHS) in 2024/25. Publication COVID-19 Statistics Surveys

## COVID-19 and long COVID 2024/25: New Zealand Health Survey
This page presents a summary of data from questions about COVID-19 and long COVID added to the New Zealand Health Survey (NZHS) in 2024/25.
- Consultation on Proposed Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Registered Nurse Prescribers: Analysis of submissions Publication date: 2 March 2026 This document summarises feedback from the 2025 public consultation on amendments to the specified prescription medicines list for designated registered nurse prescribers. Publication Medicine issues

## Consultation on Proposed Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Registered Nurse Prescribers: Analysis of submissions
This document summarises feedback from the 2025 public consultation on amendments to the specified prescription medicines list for designated registered nurse prescribers.
- Consultation on Proposed Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Pharmacist Prescribers: Analysis of submissions Publication date: 2 March 2026 This document summarises feedback from the 2025 public consultation on amendments to the specified prescription medicines list for designated pharmacist prescribers. Publication Medicine issues

## Consultation on Proposed Amendments to the Specified Prescription Medicines List for Designated Pharmacist Prescribers: Analysis of submissions
This document summarises feedback from the 2025 public consultation on amendments to the specified prescription medicines list for designated pharmacist prescribers.
